title: THRISHAL12345/HexAgent
summary: A production-grade, fully autonomous penetration testing framework built for local execution. Features a decoupled cognitive loop and robust event-driven architecture.

title: langbot-app/LangBot
summary: Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台/ Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Matrix e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, GLM, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, openclaw / hermes agent, deerflow

title: likhith-v1/prr
summary: A local Python code-review CLI that pairs ruff, mypy, and bandit with an Ollama model — review files, scan projects, and post inline GitHub PR comments.

title: baska12kal-svg/AI-Studio
summary: Local AI software engineering environment powered by Ollama.

title: Parad0x-Labs/nulla-local
summary: Local-first personal AI. Runs on your machine, remembers your work, helps research & workflows. Optional P2P. Alpha.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: phuetz/code-buddy
summary: Open-source multi-provider AI coding agent — terminal + Electron desktop (Cowork) + 24/7 multi-AI fleet, free-first on local Ollama. Opt-in, human-gated evolutionary self-improvement that ingests research to set its own goals. 15 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), ~110 tools, MCP, voice+vision companion.

title: AntoineF23/AiMI
summary: A tiny pixel-art pet that lives on your screen, powered by any AI you choose (Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral...). It chats, learns about you, asks to peek at your screen, and turns your day into a zero-pressure game: XP, sticker drops, gifts, minigames, evolutions. macOS, 100% local & private.

title: BigBill1418/DroneOpsCommand
summary: Self-hosted mission management platform for commercial drone operators. AI report generation (Ollama/Mistral), invoicing, flight log import, PDF export, CRM, weather/airspace intel. Docker Compose full stack.

title: JSungMin/vts-local-orchestrator
summary: Claude delegates code search & file-reading to a free local LLM — so it spends tokens on thinking, not raw output. Local-only.

title: majiayu000/litellm-rs
summary: A high-performance AI Gateway written in Rust — call 100+ LLM APIs using OpenAI format

title: Gitlawb/zero
summary: The coding agent that answers to you, your model, your machine, your rules.

title: dragoshont/apprenticeops
summary: Open, reproducible benchmark for small, quantized, fully-offline local LLMs as homelab ops assistants — profiling quality × safety × energy together and reducing model choice to a measured Pareto front. arXiv preprint → NeurIPS D&B track. Human-guided, AI-assisted.

title: iunera/ypipe
summary: The all-in-one, airgapped Local AI. Ypipe bundles a high-performance inference engine, specialized models, and pre-configured MCP servers into a single, self-contained Java executable.   Zero-dependency orchestration for autonomous agent workflows with 100% data sovereignty. No cloud, no Python hell - just industrial-grade local intelligence.

summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive memory for AI agents & teams — beyond RAG. Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter every time you search: hybrid search + a neural memory graph that learns. Works with Claude, ChatGPT & any MCP client.

title: 1Panel-dev/1Panel
summary: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: The open creative AI workspace
